name: Secrets Management (Doppler)
description: Eliminate .env files from production using Doppler. Secrets are stored encrypted, access is audited, and they sync automatically to Vercel/AWS/GitHub Actions. Includes secret rotation and the developer local workflow.

steps.description: Authenticate Doppler CLI with your account
Prefix dev command with "doppler run --": "dev": "doppler run -- next dev"
Inject Doppler secrets into GitHub Actions using DOPPLER_TOKEN secret
Script to sync Doppler secrets to Vercel environment using doppler secrets download
Remove .env from gitignore — you no longer need it. Add .env.backup instead.
